title: eCommerce Platform for Local Retail
description: Built a scalable eCommerce platform for a local retailer, increasing their online sales by 40% within three months. Features include a user-friendly product catalog, secure payment gateway, and real-time order tracking.

title: Portfolio Site for Creative Agency
description: Redesigned a portfolio website for a creative agency, earning them recognition for their stunning digital presence. The site features dynamic animations, a responsive gallery, and SEO optimization.

title: Custom Web App for Tech Startup
description: Developed a custom web application for a tech startup, helping them secure their first round of funding. The app includes a dashboard for user analytics, API integrations, and a scalable backend.

title: Educational Platform for Online Learning
description: Created an online learning platform with features like course management, user authentication, and progress tracking. Designed to be fast, accessible, and engaging for students.
